scope: One bounded Prize Pack slice using currently accessible evidence only.

target_slice.label: Accessible Series 2-3 Window
target_slice.shared_question: Across currently accessible Prize Pack Series 2 and Series 3 sources, does this card appear in exactly one corroborated series or in more than one, without depending on blocked official Series 1/2 acquisition?

ready_rows.why_blocked: The row still lacks deterministic series corroboration across the supported Prize Pack coverage window.

evidence_sources.note: Family-only stamped row without independent series proof.
